description: CompositionGrey sleeveless padded jacket with a grey and purple half lining made of a blended fabric, has a fully lined hood, mock neck with a full front zipper, quilted look, ribbed armholes and hem, two buttoned insert pockets on the sides, one inner pocket on the left chest and branding appliquéd at the backFitRegularWash careDry clean onlyFor a look that's ready to face the great outdoors, this padded sleeveless jacket from provogue brings performance wear into the 21st century in style. Wear it on your outdoor adventures to suit your style statement for the day. Layer it over a plaid shirt and vintage denims for unparalleled cool.Model statisticsThe product is a size L on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
